title: KEDA Dashboard
description: KEDA OpenTelemetry dashboard for operator build info, scaler activity, scaler latency, scaling errors, registered resources, triggers, scale-loop latency, and CloudEventSource signals.

50bce367-75c2-4d21-92db-9ba8e588b1f5.description: KEDA trigger type (e.g. prometheus, cron). Used by the Registered Triggers panel only — resource-type and loop-type values from other metrics use different naming and are intentionally excluded.
50bce367-75c2-4d21-92db-9ba8e588b1f5.name: trigger_type

widgets.description: Current active scaler count from keda.scaler.active.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

widgets.title: Active Scalers

widgets.description: Current paused ScaledObject count from keda.scaled.object.paused.
widgets.title: Paused ScaledObjects

widgets.description: Error rate for all KEDA scalers from keda.scaler.errors.total.
widgets.title: Total Scaler Error Rate

widgets.description: Scaler active state over time from keda.scaler.active.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

widgets.title: Scaler Active State

widgets.description: Current scaler metric values used by HPA from keda.scaler.metrics.value.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

widgets.title: Scaler Metric Value

widgets.description: Latency of retrieving scaler metrics from keda.scaler.metrics.latency.seconds.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

widgets.title: Scaler Metric Latency

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

widgets.description: Paused ScaledObject state by object from keda.scaled.object.paused.
widgets.title: Paused ScaledObjects

widgets.description: Internal scale loop latency from keda.internal.scale.loop.latency.seconds.
widgets.title: Scale Loop Latency

widgets.description: Registered KEDA custom resources from keda.resource.registered.count.
widgets.title: Registered Resources

widgets.description: Registered triggers by trigger type from keda.trigger.registered.count.
widgets.title: Registered Triggers

widgets.description: Emitted CloudEvents by source, destination, and state from keda.cloudeventsource.events.emitted.count.
widgets.title: CloudEvents Emitted
